entries.content: transitive verb past tense, past participle set ① (place, position) 放置 fàngzhì ‹object›; 安置 ānzhì ‹person›▸ his hat was set at a rakish angle 他歪戴着帽子 ② (arrange, establish) 确定 quèdìng ‹time, venue, target, standard›
entries.label: A
entries.name: transitive verb

entries.content: intransitive verb past tense, past participle set ① (go down) «sun, moon» 落下 luòxia ② (solidify) «jam, concrete, dye» 凝固 nínggù
entries.label: B
entries.name: intransitive verb

entries.content: noun ① (of tools, spanners, knives etc.) 一套 yī tào
entries.label: C
entries.name: noun

entries.content: adjective ① (established) 固定的 gùdìng de▸ events usually follow a set pattern 事态通常按固有的模式发展
entries.label: D
entries.name: adjective

entries.content: PHRASAL VERBS set about: transitive verb ① [set about sth] (begin purposefully) 着手干 zhuóshǒu gàn ‹job›▸ to set about doing sth; 着手做某事 set against transitive verb ① (cause to be in conflict with) to set sb against sb/sth; 使某人反对某人/某事物 shǐ mǒu rén fǎnduì mǒu rén/mǒu shìwù
entries.name: PHRASAL VERBS

entries.content: ORIGIN Old English of Germanic origin.
entries.name: ORIGIN
